repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: National Extension Association of Family and Consumer Sciences, New York Affiliate records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: National Extension Association of Family and Consumer Sciences (U.S.). New York Affiliate

did.physdesc: Reports, minutes, correspondence, financial records, newsletters, and other records.
did.abstract: Include reports, minutes, correspondence, financial records, and newsletters. Also records of their 50th anniversary celebration.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Martin Heggestad, May 2004Ariel Joy Conant, November 2006Eileen Keating, October 2015

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The organization originated as the New York State Home Demonstration Agents' Association in 1934. The organization later changed its name to the New York State Association of Extension Home Economists (NYSAEHE) and in 1995 it changed its name to the New York State Extension Association of Family and Consumer Sciences (NYSEAFCS).

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Include reports, minutes, correspondence, financial records, and newsletters. Also records of their 50th anniversary celebration.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: National Extension Association of Family and Consumer Sciences, New York Affiliate records, #3920. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
